title: Quorum — Distributed Systems Lab
description: A deterministic distributed-systems simulator: Raft, Multi-Paxos and leaderless EPaxos consensus (egalitarian, dependency-graph ordering with fast/slow paths, SCC execution and explicit-prepare recovery), PBFT and HotStuff Byzantine fault tolerance (survive malicious replicas), Snow/Avalanche metastable consensus (Slush/Snowflake/Snowball — agreement by random subsampling instead of quorums, with a live opinion-over-time chart and Byzantine resilience), a Dynamo-style tunable-quorum store (sloppy quorums, hinted handoff, read repair, vector-clock siblings), a Chord DHT, CRDTs, gossip/SWIM failure detection, vector clocks and 2PC/3PC, an ABD linearizable register (atomic read/write storage with no consensus), all from scratch on one seeded discrete-event kernel with a controllable network, time-travel scrubbing and live invariant checking.
